name: Masked Fighter
description: An elite duelist that alternates between mounted phases alongside the O.R.C. Broodmother and on-foot phases where it hunts the player with the Sour Katanga.
behavior: When fighting on foot it leans on feints, blocking stances, and long repositioning flips to force late blocks or overuse of stamina.
interactionWithPlayer: It punishes players who try to steal turns after partial strings or who lose control of spacing during the duo phases.
interactionWithCreatures: Its whole combat identity is tied to the O.R.C. Broodmother: sometimes it rides her, and sometimes it uses her as parallel pressure to saturate the arena.
strategy: Fresh helps, but the real key is reading the tempo of its strings and saving resources for the phase where both bosses attack at once.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Charged Attack: 110. Leap Attack: 55. 3-Hit Combo: 40 per hit. 4-Hit Spin Combo: 40 per hit. 5-Hit Combo: 43 on the finisher.

abilities.name: Charged Attack
abilities.description: It leans back briefly and then drives the Sour Katanga forward, breaking guard unless you perfect block.

abilities.name: Leap Attack
abilities.description: It leaps and crashes down in two hits: the blade itself and the landing shock if you stay too close.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A basic slash string used to keep pressure on you once it is already in range.

abilities.name: 4-Hit Spin Combo
abilities.description: Two spaced spins followed by a short pause and two faster spins that punish nervous blocking.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A very fast four-slash string that ends in its charged thrust finisher.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It advances while guarding with the blade and shrugs off frontal light attacks until you break it with a charged hit.

abilities.name: Reposition
abilities.description: It flips a long distance backward to reset spacing; in the later phase it also leaves tang behind.

abilities.name: Feint
abilities.description: It fakes a basic slash to bait an early block and punish the reaction afterward.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: It starts mounted on the O.R.C. Broodmother. The spider is the primary attacker and the fighter has not entered the duel yet.

abilities.name: Mounted Presence
abilities.description: It stays on the mount and does not become the main target until the Broodmother loses enough health.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.trigger: Begins when the O.R.C. Broodmother drops to 75% total health.
bossPhases.summary: It dismounts and chases the player on foot while the Broodmother stays on the ceiling firing sour projectiles.

attacks.name: Charged Attack
attacks.tell: It leans back before lunging with the katana forward.
attacks.howToAvoid: Perfect block it or sidestep as the lunge actually begins.
attacks.notes: It breaks guard and adds tang buildup on hit.

attacks.name: Leap Attack
attacks.tell: It jumps high with the sword ready to crash down.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not dodge too early; wait for the real descent.

attacks.name: 3-Hit Combo
attacks.tell: It opens with a short slash and continues if you stay in range.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the full string before taking your turn.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It advances with the katana raised and shrugs off light attacks until you break it with a charged hit.

abilities.name: Feint
abilities.description: It cuts an animation short before the real strike to steal an early block.

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.trigger: It resumes when the fighter climbs back onto the mount after the first on-foot duel.
bossPhases.summary: The fighter mounts up again and reduces direct pressure while the Broodmother resumes the mounted pattern.

abilities.name: Return to Mount
abilities.description: Its direct pressure drops while it folds back into the Broodmother's mounted pattern.

bossPhases.label: Phase 4
bossPhases.trigger: Begins when the O.R.C. Broodmother reaches 40% total health.
bossPhases.summary: It dismounts again, but now both bosses attack at the same time. Duo pressure rises and both gain 70% general damage resistance.
newPatterns: The upgraded Reposition leaves tang behind, and you can no longer rely on a safe pause after breaking her guard.

attacks.name: Charged Attack
attacks.tell: The same lean-back tell, but now it can overlap with Broodmother pressure.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not reflex-block if the spider is also collapsing on you; make space and read which one reaches you first.

attacks.name: Leap Attack
attacks.tell: It commits harder to the jump when the Broodmother has already pinned your attention elsewhere.
attacks.howToAvoid: Save stamina for the double landing hit.

attacks.name: 4-Hit Spin Combo
attacks.tell: Two measured spins followed by two very fast finishers while it keeps walking you down.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not steal a turn after the second spin if the Broodmother is still nearby.

attacks.name: 5-Hit Combo
attacks.tell: It accelerates through an aggressive string and still ends in the heavy thrust even if you are backing away.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the full chain calmly or drift sideways; the fatal mistake is eating the finisher because you assumed the string was over.

abilities.name: Reposition+
abilities.description: The backward flip now leaves behind a lingering tang puddle.

abilities.name: Enhanced Blocking Stance
abilities.description: Even if you break the stance with a charged attack, you no longer always get a free stagger.

abilities.name: Feint
abilities.description: It still uses feints to steal early blocks right when the duo is already saturating the arena.

specialTraits: During this phase both bosses rise to 70% general damage resistance.

bossPhases.label: Phase 5
bossPhases.trigger: Begins if the fighter drops to 20% health or the Broodmother drops to 12%.
bossPhases.summary: It mounts up one final time and the O.R.C. Broodmother regains 35% health before the closing stretch.

abilities.name: Final Mount
abilities.description: The fighter hands offensive priority back to the Broodmother, but the heal makes the ending much longer.

specialTraits: The 35% heal always applies to the O.R.C. Broodmother when this phase starts.

inflicts: All of its strikes slash with the Sour Katanga, add sour damage, and most combo hits apply tang buildup per impact.
specialTraits: It heavily resists woozy buildup and alternates between mounted phases and on-foot dueling phases.
